flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at The University of Montana-Western rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($17.2k → $20.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at The University of Montana-Western rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.7k → $6.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at The University of Montana-Western fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at The University of Montana-Western rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 (41.8% → 51.2%).
